name: archive-docs
description: Relationship-aware document archival plugin for starter-docs. Provides skills for intelligent archival with upstream/downstream tracing, staleness detection, deprecation-in-place, and dry-run impact analysis.

skills.name: archive
skills.description: Core archival with 4 modes: direct, related, replacement, and project archive.

skills.name: staleness-check
skills.description: Advisory scanning for archival candidates based on completion and deprecation signals.

skills.name: deprecate
skills.description: Mark artifacts as superseded in-place without moving to the archive.

skills.name: archive-impact
skills.description: Dry-run impact analysis showing what would break if an artifact were archived.
